diagrams.title: Modus Ponens Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how from P→Q and P, we derive Q
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the affirming the antecedent pattern

diagrams.title: Modus Tollens Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how from P→Q and ¬Q, we derive ¬P
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the denying the consequent pattern

diagrams.title: Hypothetical Syllogism Chain
diagrams.description: Chain of implications showing P→Q, Q→R gives P→R

diagrams.title: Truth Table Validity Check
elements: Highlight rows where all premises true

diagrams.title: Fallacy Comparison
diagrams.description: Compare valid and invalid inference patterns

visuals.description: Visual diagram for reasoning patterns in propositional logic
